name: Bang Holdings Corp.
summary: Bang Holdings Corp., a brand management and advertising technology company, provides content and an influencer-based marketing network to the cannabis industry. It operates 4TTnetwork, a multi-platform comprising TwentyToday, VaporBang, AmericanToker, and HighOnStocks; and Green Monkey Network, a network of social media influencers in the marijuana industry. Bang Holdings Corp. was incorporated in 2014 and is based in North Miami Beach, Florida.
